markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the specific individual leaves the role as defined in the payout criteria.
markets.rules_primary: If Tony Gonzales leaves Congress before the midterms, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Tony Gonzales must have an actual departure date and vacate the role within the time period. 


If the person leaves the role due to death (i.e., if the person dies while holding the role), all contracts on the person may resolve to the last fair price as determined in the sole discretion of the Exchange. Temporary leaves of absence, suspensions, or recusals do not constitute leaving, resigning from, or retiring from the role unless the individual formally and permanently ceases to hold the position. If the person vacates the role and then re-occupies the role, the contract may settle on the initial vacation of the role. If the role otherwise ceases to exist with no plausible successor, the contract may resolve to "No."



For "leave," cessation of holding the role qualifies, including resignation, retirement, removal, expulsion, expiration of term without renewal, recall, or other means by which the individual no longer occupies the role—this includes both voluntary and involuntary early departure AND the natural expiration of a term.
markets.title: Will Tony Gonzales leave Congress before the midterms?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire when election results are certified.
markets.rules_primary: If the certified percentage of the vote received by Michael Whatley in the 2026 North Carolina Republican Senate primary is 95% to 100%, inclusive of both endpoints, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The percentage is calculated as (total votes received by the specified person/party ÷ total valid votes cast) × 100, rounded to the specified decimal places. Resolution is based on certified/official results only, not preliminary results. Write-in votes are included if they appear in certified results. Invalid, spoiled, or rejected ballots are excluded from both numerator and denominator. If multiple rounds of voting occur (e.g., ranked choice voting), the percentage is based on the specified round or the first round if not specified. If the election is cancelled, postponed beyond the market expiration, or no certified results are available by expiration, the market resolves to No. If a recount changes the certified percentage before expiration, the most recent certified percentage is used.
markets.title: Will Michael Whatley receive between 95% and 100% of the vote in the 2026 North Carolina Republican Senate primary?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the official vote count is certified.
markets.rules_primary: If the total vote count in the 2026 U.S. House of Representatives elections is 89,999,999 and below, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The vote count refers to the officially certified results from the relevant election authority. Provisional, absentee, early, mail-in, or electronic ballots are included only if reflected in the official certification. In preferential or ranked-choice systems, the contract resolves based on the vote count identified as the official result by the certifying authority. If the election is held in multiple phases, the contract resolves on the certified aggregate total. If a runoff forms part of the certified result, it is encompassed. The contract resolves based on officially certified results regardless of ongoing appeals. Preliminary counts, exit polls, projections, or uncertified results do not qualify. If the election is postponed but held within one year of the originally scheduled date, the contract remains valid; if postponed beyond one year or canceled, all contracts resolve to No.
markets.title: Will the total 2026 U.S. House turnout be less than 90 million?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the follower count milestone is reached
markets.rules_primary: If clavicular has At least 500000 Followers on Kick before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The follower count is determined by the publicly displayed count on the account's profile page. If the platform displays abbreviated numbers (e.g., "1.2M"), the most precise available count will be used. The count is assessed at 11:59 PM ET before the target date. If the account is permanently suspended or deleted, the market resolves to last fair price. If the account becomes private and follower counts are invisible, the market resolves to No. Temporary suspensions that are lifted before the target date do not affect resolution if follower counts become visible again.
markets.title: Will clavicular have At least 500000 Followers before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if formal charges are filed.
markets.rules_primary: If any sitting Supreme Court Justice has been formally charged with any U.S. federal crime after Issuance and before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Formal charges require the filing of a criminal complaint, information, or indictment with an appropriate court. Arrests without charges, being named as a target of investigation, civil lawsuits, and administrative actions do not constitute charges. Traffic violations that don't require court appearances and sealed charges that remain sealed through the deadline also don't count. If charges are filed and then dismissed before the deadline, the market still resolves to Yes. Pre-trial diversion agreements involving formal charges count as charges. For groups of individuals, charges against any member of the specified group trigger the criterion. For this market, a Justice must be a sitting member of the Supreme Court at the time of charging.
markets.title: Will any sitting Supreme Court Justice be charged with a any federal crime before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.rules_primary: If any legislation imposing new or increased tariffs has become law before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The bill must pass the full chamber (not just committee) for House or Senate passage. For "become law" markets, the bill must be signed by the President or become law through veto override. Presidential pocket vetoes that expire resolve to No. Joint resolutions are treated as bills. Treaties require two-thirds Senate approval for passage. The market resolves based on the first occurrence of the specified milestone.
markets.title: Will any legislation imposing new or increased tariffs become law before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the performance occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Kanye West / Ye performs at Tiger Stadium between February 20, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET and December 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: For purposes of this contract, "performed" means the person appears live on stage or in the official broadcast/stream and performs (including singing, dancing, DJ-ing, or playing an instrument), either as a scheduled performer or as a guest appearance during another artist's performance. Guest appearances where the person performs live music qualify. Festival appearances that include a live set qualify. The following do not qualify: appearing only as an award presenter or host, being in the audience without performing, having music played without participation, appearing in video montages or tribute segments without performing, pre-show or post-show performances outside the official event timeframe, appearances without performing (speeches, award acceptances, interviews, promotional events), canceled or postponed shows where no performance occurs in the time period, rehearsals and sound checks, or virtual participation via livestream into the venue.
markets.title: Will Kanye West / Ye perform at Tiger Stadium between February 20, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET and December 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET?

markets.rules_secondary: For purposes of this contract, "performed" means the person appears live on stage or in the official broadcast/stream and performs (including singing, dancing, DJ-ing, or playing an instrument), either as a scheduled performer or as a guest appearance during another artist's performance. Guest appearances where the person performs live music qualify. Festival appearances that include a live set qualify. The following do not qualify: appearing only as an award presenter or host, being in the audience without performing, having music played without participation, appearing in video montages or tribute segments without performing, pre-show or post-show performances outside the official event timeframe, appearances without performing (speeches, award acceptances, interviews, promotional events), canceled or postponed shows where no performance occurs in the time period, rehearsals and sound checks, or virtual participation via livestream into the venue.
markets.title: Will Kanye West / Ye perform at Bryant-Denny Stadium between February 20, 2026 at 10:00 AM ET and December 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the season ends earlier than expected.
markets.rules_primary: If Victor Osimhen leads UEFA Champions League in goals scored for the 2025-26 season (including league phase and knockout rounds), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: If multiple participants finish with exactly the same goal total and the league does not declare a single winner via official tiebreakers, “Yes” contracts for each tied participant will pay $1 divided by the number of tied participants (rounded down to the nearest cent). “No” contracts will pay $1 minus the applicable Yes payout.
markets.title: Will Victor Osimhen lead UEFA Champions League in goals scored for the 2025-26 season (including league phase and knockout rounds)?

markets.rules_secondary: If multiple participants finish with exactly the same goal total and the league does not declare a single winner via official tiebreakers, “Yes” contracts for each tied participant will pay $1 divided by the number of tied participants (rounded down to the nearest cent). “No” contracts will pay $1 minus the applicable Yes payout.
markets.title: Will Marcus Rashford lead UEFA Champions League in goals scored for the 2025-26 season (including league phase and knockout rounds)?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the law is enacted
markets.rules_primary: If legislation increasing New York City's property tax rate has become law in New York City before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Enactment requires completion of all constitutional and legal requirements for the legislation to become binding law. For standard legislation requiring executive approval, this includes final passage by all required legislative bodies, executive signature OR becoming law despite executive inaction OR successful veto override, and satisfaction of any required waiting periods. For legislation not requiring executive approval, this includes final passage and completion of required waiting periods. For constitutional amendments, this includes passage with required supermajorities and completion of ratification processes. For executive orders, this includes official signature, publication in official government records, and legal effectiveness. Legislative passage without completed executive action, passage by only some required bodies, provisional passage, non-binding resolutions, and draft orders do not constitute enactment. Enactment occurs when all requirements are completed, regardless of pending judicial challenges.
markets.title: Will legislation increasing New York City's property tax rate become law in New York City before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.rules_primary: If the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increases by more than 0.5% (single-decimal) in June 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market will always close at 8:25 AM ET on the scheduled day of the data release (July 14, 2026). Please note: the Expiration Value is the single-decimal value published at the Source Agency. In the case of a delay in data caused by a federal government shutdown impacting the reliability of the Source Agency, the market’s latest Expiration Date will be extended to the sooner of the release of the Underlying or six months after the end of the government shutdown.
markets.title: Will CPI rise more than 0.5% in June 2026?

markets.rules_primary: If Pope Leo XIV is Time Person of the Year for 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
This will count towards the payout criterion: 
If multiple persons win, all persons that are listed are encompassed within the Payout Criterion. If, for example, the Person of the Year is “Joe Biden and Kamala Harris”, both “Joe Biden” and “Kamala Harris” strikes are encompassed within the Payout Criterion. 
The person must be explicitly named as the Person of the Year or pictured on the/a relevant cover if they are associated with the group/concept winning (the picture is only relevant for a natural human being winning). Some examples to illustrate this: “Jamal Khasogghi” would resolve to Yes in 2018, when “The Guardians” won, as he is also named and shown on a cover and falls within “The Guardians”. Similarly, “Bill Gates” would resolve to Yes in 2005. 
If Time uses language that does not specifically refer to a person or organization (examples being 2018’s “The Guardians of Truth” or 2017’s “The Silence Breakers”), Kalshi will resolve markets to the most simple meaning reasonable. In those cases, “Journalists” and “the Me Too movement” would resolve to Yes.

This does NOT count towards the payout criterion: 
If there is no Person of the Year (and instead many variations thereof, e.g. Entertainer of the Year, Hero of the Year), that is not encompassed in the Payout Criterion. 
If “ChatGPT” was the Person of the Year, strikes of “AI” or “LLMs” would resolve to No, since even if they are conceptually linked, they are not synonymous (and thus are not explicitly named), and are not persons, so it would not matter if they were identified in the image. Or if “Sam Altman” was the Person of the Year, and the cover showed a person using ChatGPT on their computer, “ChatGPT” would not resolve to Yes because it is not a person.
markets.subtitle: Pope Leo XIV
markets.title: Will Pope Leo XIV be Time Person of the Year in 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if certified election results are published.
markets.rules_primary: If the margin of victory for Joe Hathaway in the 2026 NJ-11 special election falls between 0% and 100%, inclusive of its lower bound and exclusive of its upper bound, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The margin of victory shall be calculated as follows based on the margin type. For percentage points: the vote percentage received by Joe Hathaway minus the vote percentage received by the candidate/party/option that finishes immediately behind Joe Hathaway if Joe Hathaway wins, or the candidate/party that finishes first if Joe Hathaway loses. For raw votes: the total votes received by Joe Hathaway minus the total votes received by the candidate/party/option that finishes immediately behind Joe Hathaway if Joe Hathaway wins, or the candidate/party/option that finishes first if Joe Hathaway loses. For electoral votes: the electoral votes received by Joe Hathaway minus the electoral votes received by the candidate/party/option with the second-most electoral votes if Joe Hathaway wins, or the electoral votes received by Joe Hathaway minus the electoral votes received by the candidate/party/option with the most electoral votes if Joe Hathaway does not.

Each margin range is inclusive of its lower bound and exclusive of its upper bound. No rounding shall be applied to the calculated margin. For example, for consecutive ranges of 5-6% and 6-7%, a margin of 5.99999% resolves within the 5-6% range, while a margin of exactly 6% resolves within the 6-7% range. If Joe Hathaway runs under multiple parties or is listed multiple times, votes attributable to the same underlying natural Joe Hathaway will be summed.


If Joe Hathaway wins the election, the margin will be positive. If Joe Hathaway loses the election, the margin will be negative. If Joe Hathaway ties for first place, the margin shall be 0. For uncontested races where Joe Hathaway is the only candidate, the margin shall be 100 percentage points or the total number of votes cast (for raw votes).
markets.title: Will the margin of victory for Joe Hathaway in the 2026 NJ-11 special election be between 0% and 100%?

markets.rules_primary: If the margin of victory for Analilia Mejia in the 2026 NJ-11 special election falls between 12% and 16%, inclusive of its lower bound and exclusive of its upper bound, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The margin of victory shall be calculated as follows based on the margin type. For percentage points: the vote percentage received by Analilia Mejia minus the vote percentage received by the candidate/party/option that finishes immediately behind Analilia Mejia if Analilia Mejia wins, or the candidate/party that finishes first if Analilia Mejia loses. For raw votes: the total votes received by Analilia Mejia minus the total votes received by the candidate/party/option that finishes immediately behind Analilia Mejia if Analilia Mejia wins, or the candidate/party/option that finishes first if Analilia Mejia loses. For electoral votes: the electoral votes received by Analilia Mejia minus the electoral votes received by the candidate/party/option with the second-most electoral votes if Analilia Mejia wins, or the electoral votes received by Analilia Mejia minus the electoral votes received by the candidate/party/option with the most electoral votes if Analilia Mejia does not.

Each margin range is inclusive of its lower bound and exclusive of its upper bound. No rounding shall be applied to the calculated margin. For example, for consecutive ranges of 5-6% and 6-7%, a margin of 5.99999% resolves within the 5-6% range, while a margin of exactly 6% resolves within the 6-7% range. If Analilia Mejia runs under multiple parties or is listed multiple times, votes attributable to the same underlying natural Analilia Mejia will be summed.


If Analilia Mejia wins the election, the margin will be positive. If Analilia Mejia loses the election, the margin will be negative. If Analilia Mejia ties for first place, the margin shall be 0. For uncontested races where Analilia Mejia is the only candidate, the margin shall be 100 percentage points or the total number of votes cast (for raw votes).
markets.title: Will the margin of victory for Analilia Mejia in the 2026 NJ-11 special election be between 12% and 16%?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if Bitcoin crosses the specified price threshold.
markets.rules_primary: If the Bitcoin spot price according to the CF Bitcoin Real-Time Index is above $100000.00 starting 02/17/2026 04:00 PM and before Jan 1, 2027 at 12:00AM ET, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The market resolves based on the CF Bitcoin Real-Time Index (BRTI) using a trimmed mean calculation. The resolution value is calculated by taking all BRTI values for each minute from market issuance until the specified time on the target date, removing the top 20% and bottom 20% of values, then averaging the remaining 60% of values. If the BRTI crosses the threshold at any point during the measurement period (triggering early expiration), the market immediately resolves. If no data is available at the expiration time, the market resolves to No. The market can resolve early if Bitcoin definitively crosses the threshold before the target date and time.
markets.title: Will Bitcoin be above $100000.00 by Jan 1, 2027 at 12:00AM ET?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if formal charges are filed.
markets.rules_primary: If any individual in connection with the Minnesota daycare fraud investigations has been formally charged with fraud, theft, embezzlement, bribery, money laundering, or conspiracy after Issuance and before Sep 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Formal charges require the filing of a criminal complaint, information, or indictment with an appropriate court. Arrests without charges, being named as a target of investigation, civil lawsuits, and administrative actions do not constitute charges. Traffic violations that don't require court appearances and sealed charges that remain sealed through the deadline also don't count. If charges are filed and then dismissed before the deadline, the market still resolves to Yes. Pre-trial diversion agreements involving formal charges count as charges. For groups of individuals, charges against any member of the specified group trigger the criterion.
markets.title: Will any individual in connection with the Minnesota daycare fraud investigations be charged with a fraud, theft, embezzlement, bribery, money laundering, or conspiracy crime before Sep 1, 2026?

custom_strike.Bill: legislation that, upon becoming law, results in the Department of Homeland Security being funded at 12:01 AM ET on the later of (i) February 14, 2026 and (ii) the calendar day after enactment

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If legislation that, upon becoming law, results in the Department of Homeland Security being funded at 12:01 AM ET on the later of (i) February 14, 2026 and (ii) the calendar day after enactment has become law before Apr 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The bill must pass the full chamber (not just committee) for House or Senate passage. For "become law" markets, the bill must be signed by the President or become law through veto override. Presidential pocket vetoes that expire resolve to No. Joint resolutions are treated as bills. Treaties require two-thirds Senate approval for passage. The market resolves based on the first occurrence of the specified milestone.
markets.title: Will DHS funding bill become law before Apr 1, 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Jannik Sinner has the same amount of major tournament wins as Scottie Scheffler, Rory McIlroy, and Bryson DeChambeau combined in 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
A major tournament is defined by the sport’s governing bodies.


Tennis majors: Australian Open, French Open, Wimbledon, and U.S. Open. 

Golf majors: The Masters, U.S. Open, The Open Championship (British Open), and PGA Championship.


For this market, only victories in the tournaments listed above will count as major tournament wins. For tennis, only Singles titles are counted — Doubles titles will not count toward the total.
markets.title: Will Jannik Sinner have the same amount of major tournament wins in 2026 as Scottie Scheffler, Rory McIlroy, and Bryson DeChambeau?

A major tournament is defined by the sport’s governing bodies.


Tennis majors: Australian Open, French Open, Wimbledon, and U.S. Open. 

Golf majors: The Masters, U.S. Open, The Open Championship (British Open), and PGA Championship.


For this market, only victories in the tournaments listed above will count as major tournament wins. For tennis, only Singles titles are counted — Doubles titles will not count toward the total.
markets.title: Will Jannik Sinner win more major tournaments in 2026?

markets.rules_primary: If a boxing match between Mike Tyson and Floyd Mayweather occurs before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this market, a “boxing match” is defined as an in-ring combat sporting event in which
  Mike Tyson and Floyd Mayweather Jr. compete against each other under boxing rules.




The bout may be professional, exhibition, officially sanctioned, or unsanctioned, provided:




  
Both individuals are the named participants,

  
The fight begins (i.e., the opening bell sounds for Round 1).






  If a fight is announced or scheduled but is postponed, canceled, declared a no-contest before the opening bell,
  or otherwise does not begin before Jan 1, 2027, the market resolves to “No.”

markets.rules_primary: If Kanye West (Ye) and Travis Scott releases a a new joint musical project made publicly available on Spotify credited to Kanye West (Ye) and Travis Scott as primary artists on the same release in 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
A “new album”,  must be an original
composition first released during  2026, including new singles, unreleased
tracks, or collaborations featuring new material. It may take the form of an LP or EP.
Re-recordings (unless in a new language), remasters, radio edits, clean or explicit releases
of the same underlying track(s), remixes, live versions, acoustic versions, instrumentals,
demos, alternative takes, “artist version”-style releases, or any other full reproduction of a
song already available on Spotify before || Time period || does NOT meet the Payout
Criterion. Additionally, uploading albums that have not previously been available on
Spotify but have been widely publicly available before <time period> does NOT meet the
Payout Criterion for a “new album”
markets.title: Will Ye and Travis Scott release a joint album this year?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If BULLY by Ye / Kanye West's sales, on the Hits Daily Double chart week immediately following the wide release of BULLY, are At Least 50000, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
This event will specifically encompass the number listed under the Albums column on the Hits Daily Double’s Top 50 chart for the relevant week. If data is unavailable or partially unavailable by the Expiration date, then all affected markets resolve to No. If Kanye West / Ye releases an album titled Bully before January 1, 2027, the market will resolve based on the Hits Daily Double chart corresponding to the first full chart tracking week following the album’s wide release.

For example, if Bully is widely released on March 20, the market will resolve using the Hits Daily Double chart dated March 26.
markets.title: Will BULLY have At Least 50000 album sales on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart for Hits Daily Double chart week immediately following the wide release BULLY?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the specific individual leaves the role as defined in the payout criteria.
markets.rules_primary: If Pam Bondi leaves as Attorney General before Sep 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Pam Bondi must have an actual departure date and vacate the role within the time period. 


If the person leaves the role due to death (i.e., if the person dies while holding the role), all contracts on the person may resolve to the last fair price as determined in the sole discretion of the Exchange. Temporary leaves of absence, suspensions, or recusals do not constitute leaving, resigning from, or retiring from the role unless the individual formally and permanently ceases to hold the position. If the person vacates the role and then re-occupies the role, the contract may settle on the initial vacation of the role. If the role otherwise ceases to exist with no plausible successor, the contract may resolve to "No."



For "leave," cessation of holding the role qualifies, including resignation, retirement, removal, expulsion, expiration of term without renewal, recall, or other means by which the individual no longer occupies the role—this includes both voluntary and involuntary early departure AND the natural expiration of a term.
markets.title: Will Pam Bondi leaves Attorney General in before September?

markets.title: Who will run for the Republican presidential nomination in 2028?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the election winner is officially declared or certified.
markets.rules_primary: If Greens wins the 2026 Baden-Württemberg state election, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For parliamentary elections, the party or coalition with the most seats wins. If two parties tie in seats: the one entering government will resolve to Yes and all others to No. If both or neither enter government, the one with the higher share of the vote will resolve to Yes and all others to No. For coalitions/alliances, only those formally registered with electoral authorities before the nomination deadline count, not post-election governing arrangements. Overhang seats, leveling seats, and appointed seats count only if specified. For referenda/plebiscites, the specified option achieves the required threshold per applicable law (simple majority, supermajority, dual majority, turnout requirements). If multiple thresholds exist (e.g., majority of votes AND majority of states), all must be met. For presidential or direct elections, the candidate who wins according to the electoral system (electoral college, popular vote, or runoff as applicable) and either (i) is inaugurated/sworn in/takes office, or (ii) the scheduled inauguration date passes without a different candidate taking office is the winner.  

The market resolves based on the official certification or declaration by the relevant electoral authority. Contested results are resolved based on the final certified outcome by the appropriate electoral authority or highest court with jurisdiction. In cases of competing claims (two presidents, disputed succession), the individual recognized by the hierarchical majority of Source Agencies prevails. The market remains open until the rescheduled election or two years from the original date, whichever comes first. Repeated postponements count towards the 2-year deadline.  If results are annulled by a court/authority AFTER announcement but BEFORE the winner takes office, the Contract remains open until re-run election or expiration.
markets.title: Will the Greens win the 2026 Baden-Württemberg state election?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the person announces departure or actually leaves office.
markets.rules_primary: If Delcy Rodriguez has either officially announced their intention to leave as Acting President of Venezuela or has actually left Acting President of Venezuela before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
An "official announcement" means a statement by the person themselves, their authorized representative, or the official body governing the office that the person will be departing from the office. Such announcements must be reported by at least one Source Agency to be considered official. The announcement must not specify they are leaving in more than a year from the statement, in which case the market does not resolve to Yes.

"Leaving office" means the person no longer holds the office in any capacity, including but not limited to: resignation (effective), termination, removal, impeachment and removal, recall, or the expiration of their term without renewal. Temporary absences such as medical leave, suspension with possibility of return, or delegation of duties while retaining the office do NOT constitute leaving office. Death does NOT satisfy the Payout Criterion for this Contract. Forced departures (termination, impeachment and removal, etc.) satisfy the Payout Criterion even without a prior announcement.
markets.subtitle: :: Acting President of Venezuela
markets.title: Will Delcy Rodriguez leave Acting President of Venezuela before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire following the first vote to confirm the next Fed Chair nominee or the their nomination being withdrawn.
markets.rules_primary: If Kevin Cramer votes Yea for the next Fed Chair nominee before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The market shall resolve to **Yes** if:

- A vote results in the confirmation of the Nominee via a procedure that does not result in the recording of a tally of votes

The market shall resolve to **No** if:

- Such a vote results in the rejection of the Nominee via a procedure that does not result in the recording of a tally of votes
- Should a withdrawal of the nominee's nomination be formally communicated to the United States Senate
- The nominee is withdrawn (or intent to nominate a nominee is withdrawn by the President or President-elect)

Should more than one Senate confirmation vote on the confirmation of the Nominee to the Office be held, the outcome of the first such vote will be used to resolve this market.

The outcomes of committee votes, hearings, or reports, cloture votes and other procedural votes will have no impact on the resolution of this market. Once the vote has been closed and the correct result of the vote has been announced, a request by Kevin Cramer to add, remove, or alter a vote shall not be considered for purposes of resolving this market, regardless of any change to the official vote tally reported by the website senate.gov or any other official source.
markets.title: Will Kevin Cramer vote for the next Fed Chair nominee?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the election winner is officially declared or certified.
markets.rules_primary: If Pauline Hanson's One Nation wins the 2026 Farrer by-election in Australia, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For parliamentary elections, the party or coalition with the most seats wins. If two parties tie in seats: the one entering government will resolve to Yes and all others to No. If both or neither enter government, the one with the higher share of the vote will resolve to Yes and all others to No. For coalitions/alliances, only those formally registered with electoral authorities before the nomination deadline count, not post-election governing arrangements. Overhang seats, leveling seats, and appointed seats count only if specified. For referenda/plebiscites, the specified option achieves the required threshold per applicable law (simple majority, supermajority, dual majority, turnout requirements). If multiple thresholds exist (e.g., majority of votes AND majority of states), all must be met. For presidential or direct elections, the candidate who wins according to the electoral system (electoral college, popular vote, or runoff as applicable) and either (i) is inaugurated/sworn in/takes office, or (ii) the scheduled inauguration date passes without a different candidate taking office is the winner.  


The market resolves based on the official certification or declaration by the relevant electoral authority. Contested results are resolved based on the final certified outcome by the appropriate electoral authority or highest court with jurisdiction. In cases of competing claims (two presidents, disputed succession), the individual recognized by the hierarchical majority of Source Agencies prevails. The market remains open until the rescheduled election or two years from the original date, whichever comes first. Repeated postponements count towards the 2-year deadline.  If results are annulled by a court/authority AFTER announcement but BEFORE the winner takes office, the Contract remains open until re-run election or expiration.
markets.subtitle: :: PHON
markets.title: Will One Nation win the 2026 Farrer by-election?

markets.rules_primary: If BULLY by Ye / Kanye West's sales, on the Hits Daily Double chart week immediately following the wide release of BULLY, are At least 950000, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
This event will specifically encompass the number listed under the Albums column on the Hits Daily Double’s Top 50 chart for the relevant week. If data is unavailable or partially unavailable by the Expiration date, then all affected markets resolve to No. If Kanye West / Ye releases an album titled Bully before January 1, 2027, the market will resolve based on the Hits Daily Double chart corresponding to the first full chart tracking week following the album’s wide release.

For example, if Bully is widely released on March 20, the market will resolve using the Hits Daily Double chart dated March 26.
markets.title: Will BULLY have At least 950000 album sales on the Hits Daily Double Top 50 Chart for Hits Daily Double chart week immediately following the wide release BULLY?

markets.rules_primary: If Zendaya performs/ is announced as a principal female character opposite James Bond referred to by major entertainment media as a “Bond girl” in the next James Bond film, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
For the purposes of this Contract, Zendaya satisfies the Payout Criterion if either:

Official Announcement:
Zendaya is officially announced, confirmed, or publicly credited as cast to perform a principal female character opposite James Bond referred to by major entertainment media as a “Bond girl” in the next James Bond film, regardless of whether the performance ultimately occurs; OR

Actual Performance:

markets.rules_primary: If the duration of the first US federal government shutdown between Feb 7, 2026 and Dec 31, 2026 due to a lapse of appropriations is at least 43 days, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
A shutdown is defined as the government's orderly suspension of agency work that is not legally excepted, typically accompanied by furloughing the employees who perform that work, when funding is unavailable.

Shutdown status is recorded at 10:00 AM ET each day. Partial shutdowns are included. A shutdown lasting "at least X days" requires the shutdown to be in effect at 10:00 AM ET on X+1 consecutive days. For example, if a shutdown is first in effect at 10:00 AM ET on October 1, 2026, and remains in effect at 10:00 AM ET on October 2, 2026, the shutdown has lasted at least 1 day.

Examples that would count toward the shutdown day count:

OMB releases a formal directive that orders heads of the affected agencies to "execute plans for an orderly shutdown," which is in effect as of 10:00 AM ET on the relevant date
OPM posts a current operating status that indicates that "due to a partial lapse in appropriations, Federal Government operations vary by agency"
During an ongoing shutdown, OPM posts a status referencing an Executive Order excusing employees for a holiday, but does not indicate the government has resumed normal operations

Examples that would NOT count toward the shutdown day count:

A technical lapse in appropriations occurs, but OMB directs agencies to continue standard operations
Government closures or operating status changes resulting exclusively from Federal holidays, inclement weather, or other emergencies, unless such closures coincide with a shutdown due to a lapse in appropriations
markets.subtitle: :: Past 10AM 3/29
markets.title: Will the US government be shut down for at least 43 days between Feb 7, 2026 and Dec 31, 2026?

markets.rules_secondary:
A “new album”,  must be an original
composition first released during  February 13, 2026 at 10:00:00am Eastern Time and ending on December 31, 2026 at 11:59:59pm Eastern Time, including new singles, unreleased
tracks, or collaborations featuring new material. It may take the form of an LP or EP.
Re-recordings (unless in a new language), remasters, radio edits, clean or explicit releases
of the same underlying track(s), remixes, live versions, acoustic versions, instrumentals,
demos, alternative takes, “artist version”-style releases, or any other full reproduction of a
song already available on Spotify before || Time period || does NOT meet the Payout
Criterion. Additionally, uploading albums that have not previously been available on
Spotify but have been widely publicly available before <time period> does NOT meet the
Payout Criterion for a “new album”

custom_strike.Bill: legislation that terminates or otherwise limits tariffs imposed by the President of the United States on Mexico

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If legislation that terminates or otherwise limits tariffs imposed by the President of the United States on Mexico has passed the House before Jul 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The bill must pass the full chamber (not just committee) for House or Senate passage. For "become law" markets, the bill must be signed by the President or become law through veto override. Presidential pocket vetoes that expire resolve to No. Joint resolutions are treated as bills. Treaties require two-thirds Senate approval for passage. The market resolves based on the first occurrence of the specified milestone.
markets.title: Will legislation that terminates or otherwise limits tariffs imposed by the President of the United States on Mexico passed the House before Jul 1, 2026?

custom_strike.Bill: legislation that prohibits data center power usage from increasing consumers' electric utility bills

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If legislation that prohibits data center power usage from increasing consumers' electric utility bills has become law before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
An example of this is the GRID Act (119th) — Guaranteeing Rate Insulation Act.

The bill must pass the full chamber (not just committee) for House or Senate passage. For "become law" markets, the bill must be signed by the President or become law through veto override. Presidential pocket vetoes that expire resolve to No. Joint resolutions are treated as bills. Treaties require two-thirds Senate approval for passage. The market resolves based on the first occurrence of the specified milestone.
markets.title: Will legislation that prohibits data center power usage from increasing consumers' electric utility bills become law before Jan 1, 2027?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If any federal or state court finds that widespread fraud, fraudulent conduct, or illegal manipulation of ballots or vote counts occurred in connection with the 2020 U.S. presidential election in one or more states before Jan 1, 2027, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: For clarity, the following do not satisfy this judgment criterion: findings of procedural irregularities, administrative errors, statutory violations related to election administration procedures (e.g., ballot curing deadlines, signature matching standards, observer access), or violations of election law that do not involve intentional fraud or deliberate manipulation of votes. Individual criminal prosecutions or guilty pleas for isolated acts of voter fraud (e.g., a single individual casting an illegal ballot) do not satisfy this criterion, even if the conduct occurred in connection with the 2020 election.
markets.title: Will any federal or state court rule finds that fraud, fraudulent conduct, or illegal manipulation of ballots or vote counts occurred in connection with the 2020 U.S. presidential election in one or more states?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the law is enacted
markets.rules_primary: If legislation that establishes a state personal income tax on individual residents of Washington, including taxes that apply only above a specified income threshold has become law in Washington before Apr 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Enactment requires completion of all constitutional and legal requirements for the legislation to become binding law. For standard legislation requiring executive approval, this includes final passage by all required legislative bodies, executive signature OR becoming law despite executive inaction OR successful veto override, and satisfaction of any required waiting periods. For legislation not requiring executive approval, this includes final passage and completion of required waiting periods. For constitutional amendments, this includes passage with required supermajorities and completion of ratification processes. For executive orders, this includes official signature, publication in official government records, and legal effectiveness. Legislative passage without completed executive action, passage by only some required bodies, provisional passage, non-binding resolutions, and draft orders do not constitute enactment. Enactment occurs when all requirements are completed, regardless of pending judicial challenges.
markets.title: Will a state personal income tax become law in Washington before Apr 1, 2026?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump leaves office before August 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: If Donald Trump leaves solely because they have died, the associated market will resolve and the Exchange will determine the payouts to the holders of long and short positions based upon the last traded price (prior to the death). If a last traded price is not available or is not logically consistent, or if the Exchange determines at its sole discretion that the last traded prices prior to death do not represent a fair settlement value, the Outcome Review Committee will be responsible for making a binding determination of fair allocation.
markets.title: Will Donald Trump leave office before August 1, 2026?
